aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Aggressive drive

💼 Career: Tum fast action loge, par coordination issues aa sakte hain

❤️ Love: Tone harsh ho sakti hai, संभल ke baat karo

💰 Money: Risk lene ka mann karega, par avoid karo

🧘 Advice: Control intensity

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum push zyada karte ho jab patience chahiye hota hai
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Stable flow

💼 Career: Tumhara consistent effort result dene lagega

❤️ Love: Comfort aur trust deepen hoga

💰 Money: Stable gain ka signal

🧘 Advice: Routine stick rakho

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum slow ho, par tumhara base strong hota hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Mental overload

💼 Career: Too many ideas execution slow karenge

❤️ Love: Confusing signals tension create karenge

💰 Money: Small mistake loss de sakta hai

🧘 Advice: Focus narrow karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Tum clarity ko khud complicate kar dete ho
cancer:
♋ Cancer
